[Home](./index.md) &gt; [koatty\_container](./koatty_container.md) &gt; [IContainer](./koatty_container.icontainer.md) &gt; [\[Symbol.dispose\]](./koatty_container.icontainer._symbol.dispose_.md)

## IContainer.\[Symbol.dispose\]() method

Dispose the container and release all resources. Implements TC39 Explicit Resource Management (using declaration). Available in Node.js 20+ and TypeScript 5.2+

**Signature:**

```typescript
[Symbol.dispose]?(): void;
```
**Returns:**

void

## Example


```ts
{
  using container = Container.getInstance();
  // container is automatically disposed when leaving scope
}
```
